---
title: "Seurat v5 and matrix input"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Seurat v5 and matrix input}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Matrix mode
sc_m <- score_pathway(expr = toy_expr$expr, meta = toy_expr$meta, geneset = "immune_small", seurat = FALSE)

# Seurat v5 mode (requires Seurat)
# sc_s <- score_pathway(object = seu, geneset = "hallmark", seurat = TRUE, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")
```
